summary: Issue #405 editable Settings stretch: intent-review spec_fidelity=pass consumed as given. Domain-grouped workflow templates, thresholds panel, validation, save/discard/retry, FBT read-only, Manual Refresh reset via settings* mock keys; 7/7 ACs mapped; settings + demo-shell targeted tests green. No CRITICAL reliability/security findings on mock-only Demo surface.

criticalFindings.description: Intent-review smell (non-blocking): Large fixture module (~500 lines) centralizes workflow templates and thresholds.

interfaceChanges.description: Append-only settings* mock keys for editable workflow templates and thresholds.

mappings.criterion: Settings groups workflow templates by product domain and shows stable workflow keys/capability badges
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/settings-workflows.test.tsx::groups workflow templates by product domain with stable keys and capability badges

mappings.criterion: Editable defaults and thresholds validate allowed ranges
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/lib/settings/__tests__/validation.test.ts::validates allowed numeric ranges for editable thresholds

mappings.criterion: Unsaved navigation warns; Save/Discard, saving, saved, validation, and retry states preserve user intent
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/settings-workflow-detail.test.tsx::shows saving, saved, validation, and retry states while preserving intent

mappings.criterion: Unsupported/FBT settings are read-only and never imply a missing capability exists
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/settings-workflow-detail.test.tsx::keeps FBT and unresolved settings read-only without fake activation

mappings.criterion: Manual Refresh clears unsaved edits and restores defaults
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/demo-shell.test.tsx::manual refresh clears unsaved settings edits and restores defaults

mappings.criterion: Vietnamese terminology and responsive/accessibility contracts pass
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/settings-workflows.test.tsx::uses Vietnamese terminology with responsive accessibility contracts for settings tabs

mappings.criterion: Failure or deferral of this issue does not block Phase 2.6 exit
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/settings-workflows.test.tsx::does not block decisions approval because settings remain separate from Quyết định

recommendations: Optional follow-up: wire dynamic settings template/threshold context into demo-shell assistance host per issue contextual-assistance checkbox.

reviewerSignoff.statement: Intent-review spec_fidelity=pass; 7/7 ACs mapped; settings + demo-shell targeted tests green. Approve PR open for #405 (no merge per 2B).

ownerSignoff.statement: Acknowledged review PASS; editable Settings mock stretch verified within ownership partition.

findings.description: Intent-review smell (non-blocking): Large fixture module (~500 lines) centralizes workflow templates and thresholds.
